DSBLTY_DFCLTY_DRSNG_BTHNG_IND_12 

LABEL: Disability Indicator — Difficulty Dressing or Bathing ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A monthly flag to indicate whether the beneficiary is five years old or older and has difficulty dressing 
or bathing. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 

SHORT NAME:
